Lost Staff of the Scorned  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: Port Items Atk Delay: 24
DMG: 11 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Nek Portal (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 18.0) at Level 39
WT: 4.6 Size: LARGE
Class: WIZ
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Charges: Unlimited
Skill: Port Items Atk Delay: 24

After about a 10 hour session, 10/27/08 picked one of these up of a skeleton type in the "temple" to the right after the bridge.. I think the last one I got came from this general location as well.. Was not visible.

Updated Stats :

Base Dmg: 11
Delay : 24
Dmg Bon: 13 (at 63)
Weight: 4.6
Slot 1, type 4 (Weapon: General)

Effect: Nek Portal (Must Equip: Casting time: 18.0)

▲ Page top
Level
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2003 at 11:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765866003
3 posts
Logically, since Wizards get the spell at 34, the staff should start working at that level also.
▲ Page top
RE: Level
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2003 at 1:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784829962
63 posts
Logic doesn't always have anything to do with it.

Consider Donal's Gauntlets of Mourning. Effect Armor of Faith. Level 39 Cleric Spell. But, it won't work until Level 45.
▲ Page top
RE: Level
QuoteReply
# Aug 27 2003 at 5:35 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591773994568
Guru
658 posts
Yes, item effect required levels don't correlate well to scribed spell levels.

My favorite example is Silken Augmenter's Pantaloons, the effect of which is Tranquility, a level 63 Enchanter spell. As you can see from Lucy, the effect works at level 50 (although since the quest requirements changed, you can't obtain these until you're level 55).

http://lucy.fnord.net/item.html?id=16815

Anyway, the required level for this item is 39.

Edited, Wed Aug 27 18:34:45 2003
▲ Page top

mana-free port.
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2002 at 11:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771948127
Scholar
46 posts
For those questioning its use, it's a mana free port and cast time is 18 seconds (roughly same amount as regular spell). No question about it, it can save time/mana but I do agree it's use is somewhat conditional. In any case, it's not pad for what I paid for it (600pp). A good item to have if you're a wizard and OOM.

QuoteReply

18 posts

QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2003 at 1:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759738547
29 posts
on all items now that have to be equiped say "casting time etc must be equiped) otherwise it will just say casting time etc. if this were not the case, i would get my ranger the cleric epic have free 96 rezz, druid epic have free 1500 dot, enchanter epic free haste etc, so verent thought of that before us and added the must be equipped thing. sorry guys but i think for an item like this, they would have must be equipped.
▲ Page top
RE: Non-wizzies...
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2002 at 6:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760252772
41 posts
I think that would depend on weather you can use the item from the inventory or you have to equip it. More than likely it has to be equipped. Otherwise you can use it.
▲ Page top
RE: Non-wizzies...
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2002 at 8:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252817760
Scholar
69 posts
Classes not listed cannot use the proc of an item, even if its from inventory.
▲ Page top
RE: Non-wizzies...
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2002 at 8:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255878569
5 posts
No, not strictly true (although being quite a general guide to go by). I can't say if this item can be used by a warrior etc, but I do know that for example, the Amulet of Necropotence can be clicked from inventory by any class (not just the caster classes listed).

I'll let you know if I loot one, so far I've been in CoM and looted 10+ Wraith Bone Hammers in my 30-40 hours there, nothing else but rubbish has dropped yet.

Edited, Mon Nov 11 08:00:04 2002

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 04 2001 at 7:39 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I have one of these for sale on the Drinal server...if anyone's interested my email address is malevolentspirit@earthlink.net.
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 01 2001 at 1:09 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I have one of these staffs i am trying to sell
Got one
QuoteReply
# Jul 21 2001 at 10:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763525330
Scholar
31 posts
I got one of these in CoM and traded it to a lvl 60 Warrior for a spider fur cloak and belt combo. Being a Monk I couldn't pass it up, he also told me if I got another one to send him a tell because a couple of the wizards in his guild wanted them. Alot of people sent me tells when I was trying to sell/trade it saying that they had not herd of it before. A few people said that they didn't think it would be usefull or worth much, while others (mostly high level players) seemed to be more intrested in it. I thought it was a pretty cool item since it was the only right click group TP I heard about. As far as value is concerned, it depends. I think it is worth 7-10k depending on the server, but do not expect to sell it quickly. The "market" for this seems to be high level wizards/guilds who want either a toy or a back up evec if they run oom/lom which are the two cases where it is most usefull. Used properly it can become effectivly a +300 mana item since you can run lower on mana and still have a way to evac your group, the down side is it is not an "insta-cast" so it may not be the "first choice" for evac, just a back up option for a close fight.
▲ Page top
Port stix

__DEL__1591752663727
2 posts
This item can be right clicked from inventory at level 47 or used from melee slot at 47 by a wizzy.

QuoteReply
# Sep 18 2001 at 11:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755970717
41 posts
not any more it can't, i'm a 50 wizard and it must be in primary melee slot to use, /shrug, not totaly useless, but imo its mostly a toy. i mostly use it as a last ditch evac or a way to make some easy money. i traded a nightshade wreath for it, so i'm happy.

This staff is cool. One time i got lost with my friend Freddy, but then he got hit by a bus. After that he was quiet, and he was also sleeping. My mom said that the bone sticking out of his leg was completely normal, but, i think she is trying to trick me. Can you guys tell me what you think is wrong with him?

(P.S. Cabbages are green)

Got this for my n00bie twink. This weapon is a right click item but my level 6 wizard (told you he was twinked) can't trigger the effect. Anyone know when this effect can be activated? Also, the speed/ damage delay on this thing is outrageous! Tanking with a 6th level fighter and I hit more often and for as much damage as he does!
